productDisplayName: Lotto Women's Flora Black Red Flip Flop
description: Get ready for that long overdue trip to the beautiful woodlands. lotto brings to you Flora, the perfect floater for your trip. Soft and cushy, the slippers help relax your tired feet and bring back the spring in your gait in style.Upper Foam thong straps for lightweight durability Lightly padded thong straps for snug Fit Elastane fabric toe separator for comfort Midsole Cushy footbed for soft feel, cushioning and maximum comfort Floral printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with waffle pattern for excellent grip on all surfaces shoe careDo not machine washRub with wet cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
